title: Building AI Agents for Real-World Problems & Workflows
summary: IBM Technology explains how AI agents operate in production systems with workflows, policies, and orchestration. The video discusses agent coordination, task enforcement, rule application, and alignment with human decision-making in real-world deployments.
writeup: IBM Technology explains how AI agents run inside production systems built around workflows, policies, and orchestration. The video covers agent coordination, task enforcement, rule application, and alignment with human decision-making across real-world deployments. It matters because moving agents from demos to production depends on structured orchestration and policy constraints rather than standalone models. Key takeaways: agents must coordinate on tasks, enforce workflow rules, and stay aligned with human decisions, including in edge deployment scenarios.
